reviews.review_description: It’s amazing puzzle game spend a lot of time playing them which I really enjoy well done and keep the updates coming please

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, and don't worry, I have plenty of updates coming...

reviews.review_description:
It was an Awesome game until the BACK button stopped working. 
I uninstalled the App & reinstalled the game and it still won't work. 
This issue only happens with THIS game.

developer_response.body: I've seen you've submitted a couple of puzzles. I think you had the same problem as one of my other players. I managed to find and fix his issue, and it would have fixed yours too if it was the same rare bug. Glad you have your game working again.

reviews.review_title: Fun, hard to play lying down
reviews.review_description: I downloaded this game to play in bed, but i have to constantly crane mybhead to see the blocks. Please consider laying mode!

developer_response.body: That's an unusual use-case! I haven't had any other requests for that, but I'll consider it if I get any more requests... I guess it wouldn't be too hard in theory. Thanks for your kind words.

reviews.review_description: im from Germany and a Option for German words would be awesome

developer_response.body: Thanks! Feel free to submit German puzzles if you like. There are a few foreign language puzzles in there if you look through all the User Packs.

reviews.review_description: Very fun game.  Sat down and played for hours.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review!

reviews.review_description:
Not everyone likes a crossword, but what if instead of clues, you were looking for words related to a particular theme? And what if the layout is in 3D, so you have back to front as well as horizontal and vertical directions? And all the letters are made available to you, broken into segments and spread about for you to pick up and put into position intersecting with other words?  If you  haven't tried this game yet, you really should. You can work your way through the free puzzles created by the developers, then go through the free puzzles created by other users, then you'll love it so much you'll want to buy the premium themed puzzle packs.
I know VR is popular for zombie killing  and rhythm games, but when you're physically tired out, you can sit back on your comfortable couch and enjoy the satisfaction of slotting in the last piece of another word puzzle!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your very kind words!

reviews.review_description: Love this a lot...The whole neon 3D puzzle idea is really cool...highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: More fun than NYTime's Connections, because that one was too hard and you only get one puzzle per day and it's not 3D. This one is just right and very enjoyable and can be relaxing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! Glad you're enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description:
This is a great little title here. Made by the same good folks who created Hanna in a Choppa (also awesome), Wordblocks is a fun combination of crossword and word category game. Some of the puzzles are more difficult than one would expect! The presentation is polished, and this feels like a finished product. My only small complaint is that strangely, every puzzle started right in front of my face, to the upper right. This didn't change even with Quest repositioning. Everything else is great. So excited to see where this goes!

l i n k t r . e e
/
q u a c k b i r t h

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review!

As for positioning, maybe try resetting your boundary/play space?

I only change the rotation of the camera on startup (you can reset this too with a press-in of the right thumbstick). The location is set to your personal origin within your space. There are a couple of circles on the floor marking the centre. If you can get yourself above those, it should all line up perfectly.

reviews.review_title: A real gem of a word puzzle game.
reviews.review_description:
This word puzzle game makes such great use of VR.
I have had so much fun solving and making puzzles for Arthur Owl's Word Block.
If you are looking for a VR experience that is both relaxing and compelling you will love this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your lovely review!

reviews.review_description:
Arthur Owl's Word Block is a fun little 3D crossword game that lets you build out crosswords in all directions! It has the full range of difficulties so you can pick and choose how deep you'd like to dive into it. 

I love the little humor sprinkled throughout the game by the owl, Arthur and I LOVE the art style. Give it a try! You can even make your own puzzles!

developer_response.body: Lovely review. Thanks for your kind words!

reviews.review_title: Terrific Game, could not stop playing
reviews.review_description:
If you hate VR, word play or fun then you should definitely skip this game.
If, on the other hand, you enjoy those things, the whimsical but minimalistic art style, the puzzles and the voice work in this game are an absolute joy!
And when you're done puzzling you can construct new puzzles in the built-in editor and share them with others.
I had a blast and found it difficult to stop.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review!

reviews.review_title: A gem of a puzzle game.
reviews.review_description:
Ive had word block for a few weeks now. I love it. I love the fact that there are so many free puzzles to do before you add more from the store.  I also love the fact you can make your own puzzles to submit into the game. 
I can see this being a really successful game. Genuinely recommend you give it a try. You wont be disappointed.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review!

reviews.review_title: Free 3D Word Puzzle w $0.99 Puzzle Packs
reviews.review_description: This game is very well-made with good colour scheme and 3 difficulty options. Comes with a cute British owl that chats with you and gives you hints. You can create and submit your own puzzles and once it is approved, you can then gain access to other user-created puzzle packs. You may also purchase in-app additional dev puzzle packs for $0.99 each which is very reasonably priced if you wish to support the dev. Bravo! 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! Hope you're enjoying the game

reviews.review_description: I am not usually a fan of word puzzles but the categories in this app peaked my interest and the style of playing was fun.  I found the design of the interface a pleasant and engaging use of a VR headset. Maneuvering in the space to analyze the puzzle from different angles seemed natural.  I needed hints now and then (the poorness of my spelling is legendary) and found that the hints where just helpful enough to get me back on track but they didn't ruin that puzzle.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review, especially since you don't normally like word games!

reviews.review_title: Great puzzle game with loads of content!
reviews.review_description: Really clever word game that’s super satisfying! I’ve not seen anything like this in VR. It’s great fun and has a lot of content, plus a level editor to make your own puzzles!... I can really imagine a community growing around this game. 😀😀😀

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review!

reviews.review_description: There are lots of different packs and options to play and is all together a very nice and relaxing puzzle game. I also like the fact you can make your own puzzles to be in the game itself

developer_response.body: Thank you for the lovely review!

reviews.review_description: The concept is sweet and simple and it works wonderfully. There are multiple things going on, you're building the obvious words to reduce the unused pieces and get a clue for the remaining words. That feeling when you realise what one of the missing words is and drag the miscreant pieces into place, it's unbeatable!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your kind words!

reviews.review_description: Even though I am not the best in word games I find this very fun.  I have been using larger words and live this. Love to be able to set back and find it relaxing and makes me think. Very enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Great to hear you still like the game even if you're not a fan of word puzzles!

reviews.review_description:
Been following you for a while, since the old days of HIAC, glad to see this one finally make it.

the way the game works is just about flawless, from the controls and puzzles, to the built-in puzzle editor.

everything is intuitive, and the controls are always visible and labeled on the in-game controllers if you get stuck on how to move something.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review!
